title: 10 best herbal creams for aging

remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Maidenhair tree creams contain antioxidants like epigallocatechin gallate (EGCG) that help neutralize free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation associated with aging skin.

Anti-inflammatory effects: The cream's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, reduce redness and irritation caused by environmental factors, pollution, and natural aging processes, resulting in a more even-toned complexion.

Collagen stimulation: Maidenhair tree creams contain saponins that stimulate collagen production, helping to improve skin elasticity and firmness, reducing the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and sagging skin.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba, also known as maidenhair tree, creams helps with aging because of its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream, rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, improves blood circulation and oxygenation to the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots. It also enhances skin elasticity and firmness, giving it a smoother, more youthful appearance. Additionally, Ginkgo biloba cream's anti-aging benefits are attributed to its ability to protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote collagen production, leading to a more radiant and revitalized complexion.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant compounds help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, which contribute to aging and age-related diseases.
Bilobalide: A triterpene derivative, bilobalide has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help mitigate age-related cognitive decline and neurodegenerative diseases.
Quercetin: A type of flavonoid, quercetin has potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with aging and age-related diseases.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of the Ginkgo biloba tree are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which help to combat aging by reducing oxidative stress and improving skin health.
Seeds: Ginkgo biloba seeds are a rich source of bilobalide and ginkgolides, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Barks: The bark of the Ginkgo biloba tree is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which help to improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of aging skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves and 10 grams of beeswax for making herbal creams.
Combine 30 grams of ginkgo biloba leaves with 200 milliliters of carrier oil in a saucepan.
Heat the mixture at 60 to 70 degrees celsius for 3 hours to release the active ingredients slowly.
Strain the mixture and discard the solids by using cheesecloth or a fine-mesh filter.
Mix 10 grams of beeswax with the strained mixture and heat the mixture at 60 to 70 degrees celsius.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: The creams contain anti-inflammatory compounds like salicylic acid, which helps reduce inflammation and irritation caused by environmental stressors, fine lines, and wrinkles, promoting a smoother and more even-toned skin.

Antioxidants: Herbal Damask rose creams are rich in antioxidants like vitamin C and beta-carotene, which neutralize free radicals that cause oxidative stress, damage, and premature aging of the skin, while also improving its texture and appearance.

Hormone-balancing properties: The creams contain phytoestrogens, which help balance hormone levels, reducing signs of menopause-related skin issues like dryness, thinning, and sagging, promoting healthier and more youthful-looking skin.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosa centifolia, also known as damask rose, creams helps with aging because of its rich antioxidant properties and ability to stimulate collagen production. The anti-inflammatory and moisturizing properties of this herb help to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, promoting a smoother and more youthful appearance. Additionally, the regenerative properties of Rosa centifolia help to improve skin elasticity, firming and toning the skin to give a more radiant and refreshed complexion. Regular use can lead to a visibly younger and healthier-looking skin.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Flavonoids present in Rosa centifolia creams have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce the visible signs of aging such as fine lines and wrinkles by protecting the skin from damage caused by free radicals.

Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids in Rosa centifolia creams have been found to possess anti-aging properties by inhibiting the production of matrix metalloproteinases (MMPs), which break down collagen and elastin in the skin, leading to sagging and wrinkles.

Rosmarinic acid: Rosmarinic acid, a polyphenolic compound found in Rosa centifolia creams, has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles by protecting the skin from damage caused by UV radiation and inflammation.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are rich in antioxidants and essential oils, which help to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and promote skin elasticity.
Seeds: They contain squalene, a natural moisturizer that helps to hydrate and nourish the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
Leaves: They are a rich source of salicylic acid, which helps to exfoliate the skin, remove dead skin cells, and improve skin texture.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30g of dried rosa centifolia petals at peak flower bloom to ensure optimal oil content and fragrance.
Infuse 200g of sweet almond oil with 30g of dried rosa centifolia petals for 2-3 weeks in a dark place.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean container and discard solids.
Combine 50g of beeswax with 100g of the infused oil and heat the mixture in a double boiler for 10 minutes.
Allow the mixture to cool and thicken before whipping it into a smooth and creamy texture.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Herbal blueberry creams contain antioxidants like anthocyanins, which help neutralize free radicals that damage skin cells, reducing fine lines and wrinkles, and promoting a more youthful appearance.

Anti-Inflammatory Activity: The anti-inflammatory compounds in herbal blueberry creams, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, can reduce inflammation, which is a key contributor to signs of aging like redness, puffiness, and sagging skin.

Collagen Boosting Properties: Herbal blueberry creams often contain vitamins A and C, which are essential for collagen production. By stimulating collagen synthesis, these creams help improve skin elasticity, firmness, and texture, reducing the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Vaccinium myrtillus, also known as blueberry, creams helps with aging because of its rich antioxidant properties. The high concentration of anthocyanins and phenolic acids in Vaccinium myrtillus has been shown to combat oxidative stress, a key contributor to the aging process. By reducing inflammation and promoting collagen production, these creams can help to improve skin elasticity, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and give the skin a more youthful appearance. This results in a smoother, brighter, and more radiant complexion.
remedy_constituents: Anthocyanins: These powerful antioxidants help combat oxidative stress and inflammation, which contribute to skin aging and the formation of fine lines and wrinkles.

Quercetin: As a potent flavonoid, quercetin has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help protect skin cells from damage, reduce the appearance of age spots, and promote overall skin health.

Gallic acid: This phenolic acid has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help neutralize free radicals, reduce inflammation, and protect the skin from environmental stressors, thereby slowing down the aging process.
remedy_parts: Fruits: Used due to their high content of antioxidants and anthocyanins, which help protect the skin from damage and promote collagen production.
Leaves: Utilized for their astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
Barks: Employed for their astringent and anti-aging properties, which can help firm and tighten the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest approximately 100g of vaccinium myrtillus berries in their ripe stage under sunlight exposure.
Combine the harvested vaccinium myrtillus with 200ml of carrier oil like sweet almond oil in a sterilized glass container.
Heat the mixture under low heat for 30 minutes with occasional stirring to facilitate extraction process.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine mesh filter into a clean sterilized container to separate liquid from solids.
Add 20g of beeswax and 10g of emulsifying wax to the liquid and heat the mixture under low heat until the waxes dissolve.

remedy_properties: Hydrating and Moisturizing Properties: Aloe vera's unique ability to retain moisture and lock it into the skin helps to reduce fine lines, wrinkles, and dryness associated with aging.
Antioxidant Properties: Aloe vera's antioxidant compounds help to neutralize free radicals that can cause cellular damage and accelerate aging, promoting a more youthful appearance.
Collagen-Boosting Properties: Aloe vera contains compounds that stimulate collagen production, which helps to improve skin elasticity and firmness, reducing the appearance of sagging and wrinkles.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe vera, also known as aloe, creams helps with aging because of its incredible anti-aging properties. The gel extracted from the plant contains vitamins A, C, and E, as well as beta-carotene and other antioxidants, which work together to combat fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots. It also hydrates the skin, plumping it up and giving it a smoother, more youthful appearance. Moreover, aloe vera's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce puffiness and sagging, leaving the skin looking firmer and more radiant.
remedy_constituents: Vitamins A and C: These vitamins help reduce fine lines and wrinkles by promoting collagen production and protecting the skin from damage caused by free radicals.

Polysaccharides (particularly Acemannan): Acemannan, a type of polysaccharide in Aloe vera, has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and improve skin elasticity.

Glucomannans: Glucomannans in Aloe vera have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and promote a more youthful appearance.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Their gel, which is extracted from the inner part of the leaf, is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Gel from Leaves: It also contains vitamins A, C, and E, which help to nourish and moisturize the skin, reducing the appearance of aging.
remedy_recipe: Grate 200g of aloe vera gel to release its soothing and moisturizing properties in the skin.
Mix 50g of beeswax with 20g of coconut oil in a double boiler to create a smooth blend.
Combine the grated aloe vera gel with 100g of distilled water and stir until well combined.
Add 10g of vitamin e oil and 5g of glycerin to the mixture and stir gently.
Pour the mixture into a container and refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow it to set.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Herbal teas such as green tea, turmeric, and ginger contain high levels of antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals in the skin, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress that contribute to signs of aging like wrinkles and fine lines.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbs like chamomile, lavender, and hibiscus have anti-inflammatory compounds that can reduce redness, swelling, and puffiness in the skin, making them useful for soothing acne, rosacea, and other skin concerns associated with aging.

Collagen-boosting properties: Herbal teas rich in vitamins C and E, such as rosehip tea, can help stimulate collagen production, improving skin elasticity and firmness, while also reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Camellia sinensis, also known as tea, creams helps with aging because of its rich antioxidant properties. It contains catechins, a type of polyphenol that neutralizes free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation. These anti-aging benefits help to plump and firm the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. By protecting the skin from environmental damage and promoting collagen production, Camellia sinensis creams help to maintain a youthful and radiant complexion, making it an effective natural anti-aging solution.
remedy_constituents: Catechins: These powerful antioxidants help combat aging by neutralizing free radicals and reducing oxidative stress, which can lead to wrinkles, fine lines, and age-related skin damage.
Gallic acid: A polyphenolic compound with anti-inflammatory properties, gallic acid helps reduce inflammation and prevent collagen degradation, promoting smoother and more youthful-looking skin.

Theaflavins: A type of flavonoid produced during the fermentation process, theaflavins have been shown to improve skin elasticity, reduce wrinkles, and enhance skin hydration, all of which contribute to a more youthful and radiant appearance.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Buds: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help protect the skin from damage and promote collagen production.
Flowers: Contain flavonoids and saponins, which help soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_recipe: Infuse 2 tablespoons of camellia sinensis leaves in 1 cup of boiling water for 5 minutes.
Strain the infused liquid through a cheesecloth into a clean container to remove solids.
Combine 1/4 cup of the infused liquid with 1/2 cup of a base cream such as coconut oil or shea butter.
Whip the mixture with a hand mixer or electric beater until it becomes smooth and creamy.
Pour the cream into a storage container and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before use.

remedy_properties: Retinol-like activity: Certain herbs like turmeric (Curcuma longa) contain compounds that have retinol-like activity, which can help improve skin elasticity, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and even out skin tone.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects: Herbs like green tea (Camellia sinensis), chamomile (Matricaria chamomilla), and lavender (Lavandula angustifolia) are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect the skin from environmental stressors and reduce signs of aging like age spots and wrinkles.

Collagen-boosting compounds: Herbs like gotu kola (Centella asiatica) contain compounds that can stimulate collagen production, improving skin firmness, elasticity, and reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ruscus aculeatus, also known as dog holly, creams helps with aging because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herb's ability to protect skin cells from damage caused by free radicals helps to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, giving the skin a smoother, more youthful appearance. Additionally, Ruscus aculeatus creams can help to improve skin elasticity, firmness, and tone, leaving the skin looking more radiant and refreshed. Its regenerative properties also promote cell renewal, revealing healthier and more vibrant-looking skin.
remedy_constituents: Phenolic acids: Help with aging by acting as antioxidants, neutralizing free radicals that cause oxidative stress and contribute to premature aging.
Saponins: Help with aging by promoting skin hydration, elasticity, and firmness, and also exhibiting anti-inflammatory properties that reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

Quercetin: Help with aging by acting as a powerful antioxidant that protects against environmental stressors, reduces inflammation, and promotes collagen production to improve skin texture and appearance.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Ruscus aculeatus leaves are used due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
Stems: Ruscus aculeatus stems are used for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help soothe and calm the skin, reducing the signs of aging.

Roots: Ruscus aculeatus roots are used due to their rich content of saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to protect the skin from environmental stressors and reduce the signs of aging.
remedy_recipe: Gather 500 grams of ruscus aculeatus roots and leaves, dried in a cool dark place for 2 weeks.
Crush the dried ruscus aculeatus into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the ruscus aculeatus powder with 200 grams of beeswax, 100 grams of coconut oil, and 50 grams of shea butter.
Heat the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly, for 30 minutes until the beeswax is fully dissolved.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth and pour into a container, allowing it to cool and solidify for 2 hours.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Elder cream's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and contribute to signs of aging such as fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in elder cream reduce redness, swelling, and irritation, making it beneficial for soothing sensitive skin and addressing conditions like rosacea or eczema.

Collagen-boosting properties: Elder cream's flavonoids and polyphenols stimulate collagen production, helping to improve skin elasticity, firmness, and hydration, which can reduce the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sambucus nigra, also known as elder, creams helps with aging because of its potent antioxidant properties. The rich concentration of flavonoids and anthocyanins in elderberry extract helps to protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals. This results in a smoother, more even-toned complexion and reduced appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Additionally, elderberry creams have anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm the skin, promoting a more youthful and radiant appearance.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These compounds help with aging by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to the visible signs of aging such as fine lines and wrinkles.
Phenolic acids: These compounds, particularly chlorogenic acid, help with aging by scavenging free radicals and protecting the skin from environmental stressors, which can lead to skin aging.

Ellagic acid: This polyphenol helps with aging by inhibiting the activity of matrix metalloproteinases (MMPs), enzymes that break down collagen and elastin, leading to skin elasticity loss and wrinkles.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Used due to their high antioxidant and flavonoid content, which helps to reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Barks: Used for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin from aging.
Leaves: Used for their rich content of tannins and flavonoids, which help to reduce puffiness and firm the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest sambucus nigra berries in late summer when they are ripe and fully colored to ensure best potency and flavor.
Dry the berries in a warm place or using a dehydrator on the lowest heat setting for 24 hours.
Infuse the dried berries in a carrier oil such as sweet almond oil in a ratio of 1:5 for 2 weeks.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container and discard solids.
Mix the infused oil with beeswax and a natural emulsifier to create a smooth and stable cream that can be applied topically.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Chamomile creams contain antioxidants that help protect skin cells from damage caused by free radicals, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles and promoting healthier-looking skin.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: The anti-inflammatory compounds in chamomile creams can soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and irritation associated with aging, while also helping to improve skin elasticity and firmness.

Soothing and Calming Properties: Chamomile's soothing and calming effects can help reduce stress and promote relaxation, which can lead to a reduction in wrinkles caused by repeated facial expressions, as well as improve overall skin health.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Matricaria chamomilla, also known as chamomile, creams helps with aging because it contains antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the skin. These properties help reduce fine lines and wrinkles, promoting a smoother and more youthful appearance. The cream also helps to even out skin tone and reduce puffiness, giving the skin a brighter and more radiant look. Additionally, chamomile's soothing properties can help to calm irritated skin, reducing the visible signs of aging and promoting overall skin health.
remedy_constituents: Apigenin: This flavonoid helps with aging by protecting cells from oxidative stress and inflammation, reducing the visible signs of aging such as fine lines and wrinkles.

Matricaria chamomilla flavonoids (including quercetin and kaempferol): These polyphenolic compounds help with aging by scavenging free radicals, reducing inflammation, and improving skin elasticity, resulting in smoother and more youthful-looking skin.

Alpha-bisabolol: This sesquiterpene lactone helps with aging by reducing inflammation, soothing irritated skin, and promoting wound healing, all of which are essential for maintaining healthy and youthful-looking skin.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and promote skin elasticity.
Seeds: The seeds contain essential fatty acids and other nutrients that help to nourish and moisturize the skin, reducing the appearance of age-related skin concerns.

(Optional) Leaves: The leaves of Matricaria chamomilla contain flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin from environmental stressors and aging.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of matricaria chamomilla flowers on a dry sunny day for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested flowers in a low-temperature oven at 30c for 2 hours to preserve their properties.
Steep 20g of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers in 200ml of jojoba oil for 4-6 hours to extract the essence.
Strain the infused oil using cheesecloth and discard the solids to obtain a clear liquid extract.
Mix the extract with 50g of beeswax and 100g of shea butter to create a smooth and non-greasy cream texture.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Dandelion cream's antioxidants help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, reducing wrinkles and fine lines associated with aging.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in dandelion cream soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing puffiness and dark circles under the eyes that can be a sign of aging.

Vitamin A content: Dandelion creams are rich in vitamin A, which promotes cell turnover and collagen production, helping to improve skin elasticity and firmness, and reduce the appearance of age spots and fine lines.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Taraxacum officinale, also known as dandelion, creams helps with aging because of its rich antioxidant properties and anti-inflammatory compounds. The cream's active ingredients, such as triterpenoids and flavonoids, help to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, promoting a smoother and more even skin tone. Additionally, Taraxacum officinale creams have been shown to improve skin elasticity and firmness, giving the appearance of more youthful and radiant skin. Regular use can also help to combat age-related skin concerns, such as age spots and discoloration.
remedy_constituents: Luteolin: Luteolin is a flavonoid that helps reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, contributing to the prevention of age-related diseases such as wrinkles, fine lines, and age spots.

Taraxasterol: Taraxasterol is a triterpenoid saponin that exhibits anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote collagen production, resulting in smoother and more youthful-looking skin.

Inulin: Inulin is a polysaccharide that has been shown to stimulate collagen production, improve skin elasticity, and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, all of which are associated with the aging process.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with aging.
Flowers: Rich in antioxidants and bioactive compounds, which can help to protect the skin from damage and promote a youthful appearance.
Seeds: Contain saponins and other bioactive compounds that can help to improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_recipe: Harvest taraxacum officinale leaves and flowers in late spring when they are at their peak potency.
Steam distill the harvested plant material for 2-3 hours to obtain essential oil.
Combine 20 grams of the essential oil with 80 grams of a carrier oil such as sweet almond oil.
Blend the mixture for 10-15 minutes using a high-speed blender until it reaches a smooth consistency.
Pour the blended mixture into sterile jars and allow it to mature for 2-4 weeks before use.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemon balm's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and contribute to signs of aging such as wrinkles and age spots.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Lemon balm's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce inflammation, a key contributor to premature aging, fine lines, and wrinkles on the skin.
Soothing and calming effects: Lemon balm's relaxing properties help calm irritated skin, reducing redness and improving skin elasticity, which can be compromised with age.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Melissa officinalis, also known as lemon balm, creams helps with aging because of its potent antioxidant properties. The herb's active compounds, such as rosmarinic acid and luteolin, neutralize free radicals that cause oxidative stress and cell damage. This leads to a reduction in fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots, resulting in a smoother and more radiant complexion. Additionally, Melissa officinalis creams may also improve skin elasticity, firmness, and texture, giving the skin a more youthful appearance.
remedy_constituents: Rosmarinic acid: This phenolic compound has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots, promoting a smoother and healthier appearance.

Urosolic acid: This triterpenoid has anti-aging properties, including the ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin elasticity, and protect against oxidative stress, leading to a more youthful and radiant complexion.

Oleanolic acid: This triterpenoid has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce the visible signs of aging, such as fine lines, wrinkles, and age-related skin discoloration, while also promoting skin rejuvenation.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are commonly used due to their high content of antioxidants and rosmarinic acid, which help to combat signs of aging.
Flowers: They contain flavonoids and other compounds that possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them useful for soothing and rejuvenating the skin.
Seeds: They are used for their essential fatty acids and other nutrients, which help to nourish and hydrate the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_recipe: Extract 250 grams of melissa officinalis flowers and leaves from dried botanicals.
Steep the extracted melissa officinalis in 1000 ml of water at 80°c for 20 minutes.
Mix 10 grams of beeswax and 20 grams of emulsifying wax in a double boiler.
Combine the melissa officinalis infusion with 20 grams of glycerin and 10 grams of distilled water.
Stir the mixture for 10 minutes to ensure a smooth and consistent cream texture.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Roselle creams helps with aging because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that combat free radicals, which can cause skin damage and accelerate the aging process. The cream's natural ingredients work together to improve skin elasticity, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and enhance collagen production, leaving the skin looking smoother, more radiant, and more youthful. Additionally, roselle creams may also help to even out skin tone and reduce age spots, resulting in a more vibrant and healthy appearance.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Roselle cream contains antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and contribute to signs of aging such as wrinkles and age spots.
Hydroxyproline content: Roselle cream is rich in hydroxyproline, an amino acid that helps improve skin elasticity and firmness, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds present in roselle cream can help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with aging skin, such as dryness and irritation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in reducing fine lines and wrinkles.
Rhyzomes: Containing bioactive compounds like saponins and flavonoids, which have been shown to improve skin elasticity and firmness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry hibiscus sabdariffa flowers to obtain high-quality raw material for cream production.
Extract hibiscus sabdariffa essence using hot water extraction method and filter the extract to remove impurities.
Combine 20% of the extracted essence with 80% coconut oil, beeswax, and vitamin e oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture under gentle stirring for 30 minutes, ensuring complete emulsification and homogenization of ingredients.
Pour the cooled and thickened cream into sterilized containers, label and store them in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cucumber creams helps with aging because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that combat the signs of premature aging. The high water content in cucumbers hydrates and plumps up the skin, reducing fine lines and wrinkles. Herbal extracts like green tea, chamomile, and lavender further enhance the cream's ability to soothe and calm the skin, leaving it looking smoother, brighter, and more radiant. Regular use of herbal cucumber creams can help to slow down the visible effects of aging, revealing a youthful and radiant complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Cucumber extracts contain antioxidants like vitamin E, beta-carotene, and flavonoids, which help neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress, thereby slowing down skin aging.
Moisturizing properties: Herbal cucumber creams retain moisture in the skin, reducing dryness and fine lines, and giving the appearance of smoother, plumper skin.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Cucumber extracts have anti-inflammatory compounds like fisetin, which can help reduce inflammation and puffiness, making it an effective ingredient for soothing and calming aging skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the cucumber plant are used due to their high content of antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to reduce inflammation and improve skin elasticity.
Flowers: The flowers of the cucumber plant contain flavonoids and saponins that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in reducing fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_recipe: Harvest cucumis sativus leaves and stems in the morning for optimal potency retention.
Blend 200g of dried cucumis sativus leaves and stems with 400ml of olive oil and heat gently for 2 hours.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container.
Mix 100g of beeswax pellets, 50g of coconut oil, and 20g of vitamin e oil with the herbal extract for 30 minutes.
Pour the mixture into sterilized cream jars and store in an airtight container for 24 hours before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turkey rhubarb creams helps with aging because of its unique blend of herbs, which work together to promote skin elasticity, hydration, and collagen production. The antioxidants in these creams help combat free radicals that can cause fine lines and wrinkles, while the anti-inflammatory properties soothe and calm the skin. Additionally, the natural exfoliants gently remove dead skin cells, revealing a smoother, more youthful complexion. As a result, herbal turkey rhubarb creams can effectively reduce the visible signs of aging, leaving skin looking radiant and rejuvenated.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Many herbal creams contain antioxidants like turmeric, green tea, and rosehip oil, which can help protect the skin from free radicals and reduce signs of aging such as fine lines and wrinkles.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal creams containing ingredients like arnica, chamomile, and calendula can help reduce inflammation and soothe the skin, which can improve skin elasticity and firmness.

Collagen-boosting properties: Some herbal creams contain ingredients like vitamin C, niacinamide, and retinol that can stimulate collagen production, improving skin texture and reducing signs of aging such as sagging and wrinkles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help combat free radicals and reduce inflammation associated with aging skin.
Barks: Contain astringent properties that help tighten and firm up the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality rheum rhaponticum roots and dry them properly for at least 24 hours.
Combine 20 grams of dried rheum rhaponticum root with 40 grams of coconut oil in a heat-resistant mixing bowl.
Heat the mixture gently over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring frequently, to infuse the coconut oil.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean glass container, retaining 30 milliliters of the liquid and discarding the solids.
Add 10 grams of beeswax and 10 milliliters of vitamin e oil to the strained oil mixture and heat it in a double boiler for 10 minutes until it reaches a smooth consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Soapwort creams helps with aging because they contain saponin, a natural ingredient that gently exfoliates and nourishes the skin. As we age, our skin's natural barrier function declines, leading to dryness, fine lines, and wrinkles. Soapwort creams' saponin content works to break down dead skin cells, allowing for cell turnover and revealing smoother, brighter skin. Additionally, soapwort's antioxidants help combat environmental stressors that contribute to aging, leaving the skin looking more radiant, supple, and youthful. Regular use can lead to a noticeable reduction in the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activity: Soapwort cream's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties help to reduce fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots by neutralizing free radicals and soothing inflammation in the skin.

Moisturizing and hydrating ability: Soapwort's natural moisturizing agents, such as saponins, help to lock in moisture, plump up wrinkles, and improve skin elasticity, leaving the skin looking smoother and more youthful.

Soothing and calming effect on irritated skin: The anti-irritant properties of soapwort cream can help to calm and soothe dry, itchy, or irritated skin, which is common during the aging process, allowing for a more comfortable and healthy-looking complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, the roots are used to create anti-aging creams that help reduce fine lines and wrinkles by soothing and hydrating the skin.

Barks: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, the barks of soapwort plants help combat oxidative stress and inflammation associated with aging, making them a valuable ingredient in anti-aging creams.
remedy_recipe: Harvest saponaria officinalis roots and dried them in the shade for at least four weeks or longer.
Grind 50 grams of dried saponaria officinalis roots into fine powder using a mortar and pestle for five minutes.
Combine the powdered root with 500 milliliters of distilled water and stir until it forms a thick paste.
Steep the mixture in a double boiler at 60°c for 30 minutes then filter through cheesecloth to extract the saponins.
Mix one part of the filtered liquid with two parts of coconut oil or sweet almond oil and stir well to emulsify.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold creams helps with aging because of its rich antioxidant properties, which help to combat free radicals that can cause wrinkles and fine lines on the skin. The cream's anti-inflammatory compounds also reduce redness and irritation, leaving the skin looking smoother and more even-toned. Additionally, pot marigold's natural moisturizing properties hydrate the skin, plumping up fine lines and wrinkles for a more youthful appearance. Overall, this natural cream works to improve the texture, tone, and elasticity of the skin, giving it a radiant and youthful glow.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Pot marigold cream contains antioxidants like flavonoids, which help neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress, thereby slowing down the signs of aging such as wrinkles and age spots.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The cream's anti-inflammatory compounds, including carotenoids and phenolic acids, can soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation and puffiness associated with aging, and promoting a smoother complexion.

Wound-healing and regenerative properties: Pot marigold contains compounds that stimulate collagen production, enhance tissue repair, and promote cell regeneration, helping to improve skin elasticity, firmness, and texture, and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, the roots of the pot marigold plant help reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Seeds: Containing omega-3 fatty acids, the seeds of the pot marigold plant nourish and hydrate the skin, reducing signs of aging such as dryness and brittleness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 25 grams of fresh calendula officinalis flowers at dawn when dew is still present for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested flowers in a warm air circulating oven set at 35°c for two hours or until completely dry.
Combine one part dried calendula petals with two parts carrier oil such as sweet almond or coconut oil and infuse mixture for eight hours.
Strain the infused mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container, discarding solids and preserving the liquid.
Mix 20 grams of the prepared herbal infusion with 30 grams of beeswax and 50 grams of petroleum jelly in a double boiler until fully incorporated.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort creams helps with aging because of its remarkable anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herb has been used for centuries to soothe skin irritations, reduce redness, and promote wound healing. As we age, our skin undergoes natural changes such as wrinkles, fine lines, and age spots. St John's Wort creams can help alleviate these issues by reducing inflammation, improving collagen production, and enhancing skin elasticity. Additionally, its antioxidant properties protect the skin from environmental stressors, preserving a more youthful appearance.
remedy_properties: Hyperforin: Helps to reduce inflammation and improve skin elasticity, leading to a more youthful appearance by reducing fine lines and wrinkles.
Hypotensive effects: Contributes to improved blood circulation, which enhances the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to skin cells, promoting healthier and more radiant skin.
Antioxidant properties: Neutralizes free radicals that cause oxidative stress and damage to skin cells, helping to protect against signs of aging such as age spots, wrinkles, and sagging skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and saponins, which help to soothe and nourish the skin, reducing fine lines and wrinkles.
Flowers: Containing hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in reducing redness and irritation caused by aging.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality fresh or dried st john's wort herb hypericum perforatum leaves and flowers.
Combine 250ml of carrier oil such as olive or coconut oil with 30g of dried st john's wort herb in a clean glass jar.
Allow the mixture to infuse for 4-6 weeks at room temperature shaking daily to combine herbs with oil.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another clean glass container discarding solids and herbs.
Mix 100ml of the infused oil with 20g of beeswax and 10ml of vitamin e oil heating gently until beeswax is fully melted.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender creams helps with aging because they contain potent antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and calm the skin. As we age, our skin's natural barrier function weakens, leading to wrinkles, fine lines, and dryness. The calming properties of English lavender help reduce stress and inflammation, promoting a more even tone and texture. Additionally, its antioxidant-rich constituents neutralize free radicals, protecting the skin from environmental damage and preserving its youthful appearance.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: English lavender contains antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and accelerate signs of aging, such as wrinkles and age spots.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Lavender's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, can reduce inflammation in the skin, which is a major contributor to fine lines, wrinkles, and age-related skin discoloration.

Soothing and calming effects: The calming properties of lavender can help reduce stress and promote relaxation, which can improve sleep quality and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression that are common with aging.
remedy_parts: Roots: Lavender roots contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making them useful for reducing fine lines and wrinkles.
Buds: The buds of the English lavender plant are rich in vitamin C and flavonoids, which can help to stimulate collagen production and improve skin elasticity.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality lavandula angustifolia flowers and dry them thoroughly in a warm dark place for 7 days.
Combine 20g of dried lavender flowers with 100ml of carrier oil such as sweet almond or coconut oil in a clean glass jar.
Infuse the mixture by placing it in a warm water bath at 60°c for 6 hours and then straining the liquid through cheesecloth.
Mix the infused oil with 10g of beeswax and 50ml of distilled water to create a smooth and consistent cream base.
Whip the cream base until light and fluffy adding 2% vitamin e oil as an antioxidant preservative before filling sterilized containers.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wild geranium creams helps with aging because it contains powerful anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that work to combat the visible signs of aging. The cream's natural ingredients help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Additionally, its potent antioxidants neutralize free radicals that can cause premature aging, promoting a more radiant and youthful complexion. By addressing the root causes of aging, wild geranium creams can leave skin looking smoother, softer, and more vibrant.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Wild geranium contains antioxidants that neutralize free radicals, which can help reduce fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots by preventing skin damage caused by oxidative stress.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: Geranium has anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness, puffiness, and irritation associated with aging, while also promoting healthy blood flow and collagen production.

Vasoprotective Properties: Wild geranium's vasoprotective effects help to strengthen and regenerate blood vessels, which can improve circulation, reduce appearance of spider veins and age-related discoloration, and promote a more even skin tone.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, wild geranium roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Seeds: Containing high levels of unsaturated fatty acids, wild geranium seeds nourish and moisturize the skin, reducing appearance of age spots and discoloration.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2 ounces of fresh geranium maculatum leaves and flowers then rinse them thoroughly.
Combine the harvested herbs with 4 cups of distilled water in a saucepan and simmer for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a glass bowl pressing firmly to extract oils.
Mix 8 ounces of melted coconut oil with the strained herbal infusion and blend until well combined.
Transfer the cream base to glass jars and store in the refrigerator for at least 2 weeks.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for aging are topical treatments infused with natural herbs that help combat visible signs of aging, such as fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots. These creams work by nourishing and protecting the skin with anti-aging properties of herbs like Aloe barbadensis, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Centella asiatica, Vitis vinifera, Ruscus aculeatus, Camellia sinensis, Panax ginseng, Silybum marianum, Vaccinium myrtillus, and Avena sativa. Without them, aging can lead to loss of confidence, reduced mobility, and decreased quality of life, severely impacting one's independence and overall well-being.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to aging that are treated with herbal creams are skin issues such as wrinkles, fine lines, and age spots. Herbal creams containing ingredients like retinol, vitamin C, and green tea extract can help reduce the appearance of these signs of aging. Additionally, herbal creams may be used to treat conditions like eczema, psoriasis, and dermatitis, which can cause dryness, itching, and inflammation. These creams often combine natural ingredients with traditional treatments for effective relief and rejuvenation.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal creams that help with aging is a blend of argan oil, coconut oil, and shea butter infused with turmeric, green tea, and aloe vera. Turmeric's anti-inflammatory properties reduce fine lines and wrinkles, while green tea's antioxidants combat skin damage and promote collagen production. Aloe vera soothes and hydrates the skin, and argan oil and coconut oil nourish and protect it, leaving skin looking smoother, brighter, and more youthful.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe barbadensis creams helps with aging because of its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The gel extracted from the plant's leaves contains vitamins A, C, and E, which work together to combat oxidative stress and protect the skin from environmental damage. By promoting cell regeneration and hydration, Aloe barbadensis creams help reduce fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots, giving the skin a smoother, more radiant appearance. Regular use can also improve skin elasticity and firmness, leaving the skin looking younger and more revitalized.
remedy_constituents: Anthraquinones: These compounds help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which contribute to aging and age-related skin damage.
Polysaccharides: These complex carbohydrates have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
Glycoproteins: These proteins help stimulate collagen production, improve skin texture, and reduce the appearance of age-related skin damage.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are the most commonly used part due to their high concentration of aloe vera gel, which contains anti-aging compounds like vitamins A, C, and E, as well as beta-carotene and fatty acids that help reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Stems: The stems, or more specifically, the aloe vera juice extracted from them, are used for their anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce puffiness and dark circles around the eyes.

Leaves (again for different properties): The outer layer of the aloe vera leaves is used to create a natural exfoliant, which helps remove dead skin cells and promote cell turnover, revealing smoother and more even-toned skin.
remedy_recipe: Weigh and crush 100 grams of aloe barbadensis gel in a blender for 5 minutes.
Mix 10 grams of beeswax and 10 grams of candelilla wax in a double boiler for 10 minutes.
Combine the crushed aloe gel with 20 grams of distilled water and 2 grams of vitamin e oil in a bowl.
Add the melted wax mixture to the aloe gel mixture and stir for 2 minutes.
Pour the mixture into a clean container and refrigerate for 30 minutes before use.

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams helps with aging because they contain licorice root extract, which has potent anti-aging properties. The cream's rich antioxidants and flavonoids help to protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals. This leads to a smoother, brighter complexion and reduced appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Additionally, Glycyrrhiza glabra creams have been shown to improve skin elasticity and firmness, giving the skin a more youthful and radiant appearance. Regular use can promote a more youthful and healthy-looking skin.
remedy_constituents: Licopyrones: Help with aging by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, which contribute to the visible signs of aging.
Glycyrrhizin: Assist in aging by protecting the skin from damage caused by free radicals and promoting collagen production, resulting in smoother and more youthful-looking skin.
Terpenoids: Combat aging by exerting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to maintain skin elasticity and firmness, and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Their high glycyrrhizin content helps to reduce inflammation and improve skin elasticity.
Leaves: They are rich in antioxidants, which help to protect the skin from oxidative stress and promote collagen production.
Barks: They contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of dried roots of glycyrrhiza glabra for a 1-liter cream base.
Combine the dried roots with 2l of distilled water in a 5-liter stainless steel pot.
Boil the mixture for 20 minutes to extract the active compounds from the roots.
Strain the mixture using a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a separate container.
Mix 200g of beeswax and 100g of sweet almond oil with 500ml of the cooled extract.

remedies.remedy_desc: Centella asiatica creams helps with aging because they contain potent antioxidants and bioactive compounds that combat the visible signs of aging. The cream's ability to improve skin elasticity and firmness is attributed to its high concentration of triterpenoid saponins, which stimulate collagen production and enhance skin hydration. Additionally, Centella asiatica's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce fine lines and wrinkles, promoting a smoother, more radiant complexion and overall youthful appearance. This results in a more vibrant and rejuvenated look.
remedy_constituents: Asiatic acid: Helps with aging by reducing inflammation and improving skin elasticity, which can help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
Madecassoside: Helps with aging by promoting collagen production, reducing oxidative stress, and enhancing skin hydration, which can help to improve skin texture and reduce signs of aging.

Madecassic acid: Helps with aging by exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and reduce the appearance of age-related skin issues.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Contain a high concentration of asiaticoside, which helps to improve skin elasticity and reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Rhyzomes: Rich in triterpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to soothe and protect the skin from aging.
Roots: Are a source of brahmoside, which has been shown to have anti-aging properties and improve skin texture.
remedy_recipe: Extract 20 grams of dried centella asiatica in 500 milliliters of distilled water for 30 minutes.
Filter the mixture through a cheesecloth and discard the solids to obtain a herbal infusion.
Combine the herbal infusion with 10 grams of beeswax and 20 grams of coconut oil.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 10 minutes or until the beeswax is fully melted.
Pour the mixture into a container and let it cool and solidify at room temperature for 30 minutes.

remedies.remedy_desc: Vitis vinifera creams helps with aging because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties found in the extract of grapes. These properties help to combat the visible signs of aging, such as fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots. The cream's ability to stimulate collagen production and improve skin elasticity also contributes to its anti-aging benefits. Additionally, the cream's moisturizing properties help to hydrate the skin, leaving it looking smoother, brighter, and more youthful. This results in a more radiant and healthy-looking complexion.
remedy_constituents: Resveratrol: This polyphenol compound helps with aging by reducing oxidative stress, inflammation, and cellular damage, which contribute to the aging process.
Quercetin: This flavonoid has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help protect against age-related diseases such as cardiovascular disease, cancer, and neurodegenerative disorders.

Fisetin: This flavonoid has been shown to have anti-aging effects by activating cellular pathways that promote longevity, improving cognitive function, and reducing age-related diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease.
remedy_parts: Fruits: Used to make creams due to their rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Leaves: Used to make creams due to their high content of flavonoids and tannins, which have anti-aging and antioxidant effects.
Seeds: Used to make creams due to their high content of saponins and antioxidants, which help protect the skin from damage and promote collagen production.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of fresh vitis vinifera leaves and 2 cups of fresh flowers in the early morning hours.
Steam distill the fresh leaves and flowers for 3 hours to extract the essential oil.
Combine 1 tablespoon of the extracted essential oil with 8 ounces of distilled water in a double boiler.
Mix in 1 teaspoon of beeswax and 1 teaspoon of emulsifying wax in the double boiler.
Pour the mixture into a clean container and allow it to cool and set for 30 minutes.

remedies.remedy_desc: Ruscus aculeatus creams helps with aging because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that work to rejuvenate and protect the skin. The cream's ability to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, as well as its capacity to improve skin elasticity, results in a more youthful and radiant complexion. By promoting collagen production and reducing oxidative stress, Ruscus aculeatus creams provide a natural and effective solution to combat the visible signs of aging, revealing smoother, firmer, and more vibrant skin.
remedy_constituents: Phenolic acids: Help with aging by exhibiting antioxidant properties, which protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals.
Furostanol saponins: Help with aging by improving blood circulation, reducing inflammation, and promoting collagen production, which contributes to smoother and more youthful-looking skin.
Steroids: Help with aging by reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and improving skin elasticity, which can lead to a more radiant and youthful appearance.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Roots: Used for their potential anti-aging effects, including reducing inflammation and promoting skin elasticity.
Stems: Used due to their possible anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to improve skin texture and reduce signs of aging.
remedy_recipe: Gather 10 grams of dried ruscus aculeatus leaves and 50 grams of beeswax and combine in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 60-70°c for 30 minutes stirring occasionally to ensure even melting.
Add 10 grams of shea butter and 5 grams of coconut oil to the melted mixture and blend well.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool to 40-50°c then whip until creamy.
Transfer the herbal cream to a clean container and store in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Camellia sinensis creams helps with aging because they contain high concentrations of antioxidants and polyphenols derived from green tea leaves. These compounds have potent anti-inflammatory and anti-aging properties that help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. By promoting collagen production and improving skin elasticity, Camellia sinensis creams can leave skin looking smoother and more radiant. Regular use can also help to protect skin from environmental stressors and damage, resulting in a more youthful and vibrant complexion.
remedy_constituents: Catechins: These powerful antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, contributing to the appearance of younger-looking skin.
Theaflavins: These flavonoids have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote collagen production.
Gallic acid: This polyphenol has been shown to have anti-aging properties by inhibiting the activity of enzymes that break down collagen and elastin, maintaining skin elasticity and firmness.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce fine lines and wrinkles.
Flowers: Utilized for their anti-aging and skin rejuvenating properties, which promote collagen production and skin elasticity.
Seeds: Employed for their rich content of omega-3 fatty acids, which help to nourish and moisturize the skin, reducing signs of aging.
remedy_recipe: Infuse 2 teaspoons of dried camellia sinensis in 1 cup of boiling water for 5-7 minutes.
Strain the infusion through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl and discard solids.
Combine 1/4 cup of beeswax, 1/4 cup of coconut oil, and 1/4 cup of shea butter in a double boiler.
Add the camellia sinensis infusion to the melted wax mixture and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into small containers and allow to cool and solidify at room temperature for 30 minutes.

remedies.remedy_desc: Panax ginseng creams helps with aging because they contain potent antioxidants and adaptogenic properties that combat the visible signs of aging. Ginseng has been shown to improve skin elasticity, reducing fine lines and wrinkles, and enhancing skin tone. It also boosts collagen production, which helps to firm and plump the skin. Additionally, Panax ginseng creams may help to reduce inflammation and promote cellular regeneration, resulting in a more youthful and radiant complexion. This makes it an effective anti-aging solution for the skin.
remedy_constituents: Ginsenosides: Help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with aging by acting as antioxidants and modulating immune responses.
Saponins: Assist in improving cardiovascular health and reducing blood pressure, contributing to overall anti-aging effects by promoting healthy blood flow and vessel function.
Terpenoids: Exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against age-related damage and promote cellular rejuvenation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in ginsenosides, compounds that help reduce inflammation and improve skin elasticity, contributing to anti-aging benefits.
Barks: Contain bioactive compounds that may help to improve skin texture and reduce fine lines, promoting a more youthful appearance.
Leaves: May contribute antioxidant properties to the cream, helping to protect the skin from environmental stressors and promote overall skin health.
remedy_recipe: Infuse 100 grams of panax ginseng in 1 liter of boiling water for 10 to 15 minutes.
Strain the ginseng infusion into a separate container to remove any solids.
Combine 200 grams of beeswax and 100 grams of coconut oil in a saucepan over low heat.
Mix 20 grams of shea butter and 20 grams of vitamin e oil into the saucepan contents.
Whip 400 milliliters of aloe vera gel with 100 milliliters of the ginseng infusion in a separate container.

remedies.remedy_desc: Silybum marianum creams helps with aging because they contain silymarin, a powerful antioxidant that protects the skin from damage caused by free radicals. This results in improved skin elasticity and reduced fine lines and wrinkles, giving the skin a smoother and more youthful appearance. Additionally, silymarin's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce age-related inflammation, promoting healthier and more radiant skin. By incorporating Silybum marianum creams into your skincare routine, you can achieve a more youthful and glowing complexion.
remedy_constituents: Silymarin: Silymarin has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with aging, promoting skin health and appearance.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids, particularly kaempferol and quercetin, possess anti-aging properties by scavenging free radicals, protecting against cellular damage, and stimulating collagen production, which helps maintain skin elasticity and firmness.

Fatty acids (e.g., linoleic and oleic acids): Fatty acids in Silybum marianum help to nourish and moisturize the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and improving skin hydration and elasticity.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Silybum marianum seeds are commonly used due to their high content of silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
Flowers: Silybum marianum flowers are used for their anti-aging and skin-protecting properties, which are attributed to their saponin and flavonoid content.
Leaves: Silybum marianum leaves are used due to their rich content of flavonoids and saponins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that can help soothe and protect aging skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 silybum marianum seeds and dry them in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 24 hours.
Grind the dried seeds into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2-3 minutes.
Mix 10 grams of the powdered seeds with 50 grams of beeswax and 20 grams of coconut oil.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at 70-80°c for 30-40 minutes or until it's fully incorporated.
Pour the mixture into a sterile jar and let it cool and solidify completely at room temperature for 2 hours.

remedies.remedy_desc: Vaccinium myrtillus creams helps with aging because they contain anthocyanins and other antioxidants found in bilberries. These compounds have been shown to protect the skin from oxidative stress and promote collagen production, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of bilberries can help to soothe and calm the skin, improving skin elasticity and firmness. As a result, the skin looks smoother, brighter, and more youthful.
remedy_constituents: Anthocyanins: These powerful antioxidants help protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, reducing the visible signs of aging such as fine lines and wrinkles.
Quercetin: This flavonoid has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the skin, which can contribute to the aging process.

Bilobol: A terpene found in Vaccinium myrtillus, bilobol has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to protect the skin from damage and promoting overall skin health.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used due to their high anthocyanin content, which helps to protect the skin from aging and damage caused by free radicals.
Fruits: Utilized for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
Leaves (again, due to its high antioxidant content): Also used due to their potential to improve skin elasticity and reduce the signs of aging.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 200g of vaccinium myrtillus dried powder and mix with 20g of beeswax in a double boiler.
Combine the mixture with 20g of coconut oil and 10g of shea butter in the double boiler.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 20 minutes or until the beeswax has fully melted.
Remove the double boiler from the heat and let the mixture cool and thicken for 30 minutes.
Whip the mixture with a hand mixer until it becomes a smooth and creamy texture.

remedies.remedy_desc: Avena sativa creams helps with aging because they contain oat kernel extract, which is rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. These properties help to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, improve skin elasticity, and protect the skin from environmental stressors. The cream's soothing and moisturizing effects also help to hydrate the skin, leaving it feeling soft and supple. Additionally, Avena sativa's anti-aging benefits may help to reduce the appearance of age spots and promote a more even skin tone.
remedy_constituents: Avenanthramides: Help reduce inflammation and improve skin elasticity, contributing to a smoother and more youthful appearance.
Phenolic acids: Act as antioxidants, neutralizing free radicals that cause oxidative stress and contribute to signs of aging such as fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots.
Fatty acids: Nourish and moisturize the skin, improving its hydration levels and reducing the appearance of wrinkles, fine lines, and other signs of aging.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Rich in antioxidants and fatty acids, Avena sativa seeds are used to create creams that help reduce fine lines, wrinkles, and skin inflammation.
Stems: Avena sativa stems contain saponins, which are used in creams to improve skin elasticity, reduce age spots, and promote collagen production.

Leaves: Avena sativa leaves are a good source of flavonoids and phenolic acids, making them useful in creams for their anti-aging properties, such as reducing skin discoloration and improving skin texture.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried avena sativa roots and chop them into small pieces for infusing.
Steep the chopped avena sativa roots in 500 milliliters of boiling water for 30 minutes to extract the medicinal properties.
Strain the liquid and combine it with 50 milliliters of vegetable oil in a saucepan for emulsification.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 10 minutes while whisking constantly to create a smooth consistency.
Allow the herbal cream to cool and thicken for 30 minutes before transferring it to a storage container.
